files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,16 @@
 # Changelog
 
+## 0.6.2 - Unreleased
+
+### Build
+
+- Deps: update Go modules and JS worker dev deps; bump pinned dev tools.
+
+### Tests
+
+- Drive: expand `drive drives` coverage (formatting + query/paging params).
+- Auth: use `net.ListenConfig.Listen` in tests to satisfy newer lint.
+
 ## 0.6.1 - 2026-01-15
 
 ### Added

@@ -61,8 +61,8 @@ help: gog-help
 tools:
 	@mkdir -p $(TOOLS_DIR)
 	@GOBIN=$(TOOLS_DIR) go install mvdan.cc/gofumpt@v0.9.2
-	@GOBIN=$(TOOLS_DIR) go install golang.org/x/tools/cmd/goimports@v0.40.0
-	@GOBIN=$(TOOLS_DIR) go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/v2/cmd/golangci-lint@v2.1.6
+	@GOBIN=$(TOOLS_DIR) go install golang.org/x/tools/cmd/goimports@v0.41.0
+	@GOBIN=$(TOOLS_DIR) go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/v2/cmd/golangci-lint@v2.8.0
 
 fmt: tools
 	@$(GOIMPORTS) -local github.com/steipete/gogcli -w .

 )
